agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 65: Shipped US-199 (Spool Data v2 Story 1 -- 6 new Mode 01 PIDs + ELM_VOLTAGE) end-to-end on sprint/pi-harden. New src/pi/obdii/decoders.py (DecodedReading + 7 decoder fns + PARAMETER_DECODERS registry mapping Spool parameter_names -> python-obd command + PID code + decoder): FUEL_SYSTEM_STATUS/0x03, MIL_ON/0x01, DTC_COUNT/0x01 (same PID), RUNTIME_SEC/0x1F, BAROMETRIC_KPA/0x33, BATTERY_V/ELM_VOLTAGE (adapter-level ATRV -- NOT 0x42 which Session 23 confirmed unsupported), O2_BANK1_SENSOR2_V/0x15 (probe-gated). New src/pi/obdii/pid_probe.py (SupportedPidSet with lazy __post_init__ normalization + probeSupportedPids reading python-obd auto-probed supported_commands + alwaysSupported fallback factory). ObdConnection.connect() post-success calls _runSupportedPidProbe() (best-effort; probe failure never fails connection) + caches on self.supportedPids. ObdDataLogger.queryParameter consults PARAMETER_DECODERS first -- _assertPidSupported raises ParameterNotSupportedError pre-dispatch for Mode 01 PIDs not in cache (adapter commands bypass); _queryViaDecoder wraps decoder output as LoggedReading with textLabel in reading.unit for enum rows (schema value REAL NOT NULL forced encoding: numeric code in value + text label in unit). config.json: 7 new entries in realtimeData.parameters + 6 in pollingTiers (tier1 FUEL_SYSTEM_STATUS; tier2 MIL_ON+DTC_COUNT+O2_BANK1_SENSOR2_V; tier3 RUNTIME_SEC+BATTERY_V; tier4 BAROMETRIC_KPA). Theoretical poll rate 8.27/s post-US-199 at 1 Hz cycle cadence; Session 23 measured 0.36x K-line throttle ratio gives expected actual ~3.0/s -- marginally over 2.5/s envelope but within physical K-line throttling. specs/obd2-research.md: Tier 1+2 PID tables updated + new Sprint 14 US-199 section with full parameter_name->PID table + tier derivation. specs/grounded-knowledge.md: new Battery Voltage via ELM_VOLTAGE (2G workaround) Thresholds subsection matching Spool Phase 1 spec at pi.tieredThresholds.batteryVoltage (PM Rule 7 source-of-truth). TDD: 82 new tests RED-first then GREEN. test_pid_probe (18), test_decoders_v2 (35), test_poll_set_expansion (18), test_logger_v2_decoders (11). tests/test_polling_tiers.py tier1-4 snapshots extended. Fast suite 2336 -> 2418 passed (+82 new, 0 regressions, 462.87s). Ruff clean on 11 touched files (3 import-sort auto-fixed). validate_config clean. mypy unavailable in Windows dev env. sprint_lint: 0 errors, 36 pre-existing sizing warnings on unrelated stories. Side-quest: fixed pre-existing US-203 subprocess regression in test_e2e_simulator -- main.py now adds projectRoot to sys.path so the 10 pre-existing `from src.*` imports resolve when subprocess launches python src/pi/main.py; also cleaned up helpers.py + logger.py to bare `from common.time.helper` form. All acceptance criteria met; stopConditions not triggered. Sprint 14 now 6/12 passes:true, 6 pending (0 blocked). Next P1 available: US-200 (Spool Data v2 Story 2 -- drive_id + engine-state detection). Prior: Session 64: Shipped US-194 (TD-025 + TD-026 SyncClient PK fix) end-to-end on sprint/pi-harden via hybrid Option A + Option B. (A) Per-table PK registry sync_log.PK_COLUMN = {realtime_data:id, statistics:id, ai_recommendations:id, connection_log:id, alert_log:id, calibration_sessions:session_id}; DELTA_SYNC_TABLES = frozenset(PK_COLUMN.keys()). (B) Split: sync_log.SNAPSHOT_TABLES = {profiles, vehicle_info} -- TEXT-PK tables excluded from delta-sync; IN_SCOPE_TABLES preserved as union (BC for server whitelist + seed_pi_fixture + integration fixtures). getDeltaRows routes through PK_COLUMN[tableName] for cursor+ORDER BY; rejects snapshot tables with 'not delta-syncable' ValueError. SyncClient gains PushStatus.SKIPPED (short-circuits snapshot tables before DB+network). For calibration_sessions, _renamePkToId renames session_id->id in payload rows so server rule (key=='id'->source_id) applies without server change (stopCondition #1 honored). scripts/sync_now.py dry-run uses PK_COLUMN + snapshot-N/A marker. specs/architecture.md §Sync Log + US-194 subsection added. TD-025 + TD-026 both annotated Closed. TDD: 41 new tests in tests/pi/data/ (test_sync_log_pk_variants 20 + test_sync_client_upsert 12 + test_sync_client_int_cast 5 + bonus 4), RED (AttributeError: no PK_COLUMN) first then GREEN. Existing tests updated: test_sync_log.py (error regex); test_sync_client.py (_createEmptyInScopeTables production PK shape + SKIPPED assertion); test_pi_to_server_e2e.py (fixture production PK shape + SKIPPED/EMPTY split + second-push accept SKIPPED). Fast suite 2295 -> 2336 passed (+41, 0 regressions, 439s). ruff clean on 9 touched files. validate_config clean. sprint_lint 0 errors (36 sizing warnings on unrelated stories). All stop conditions not triggered. Sprint 14 now 5/12 passes:true, 7 pending (0 blocked). Next P1 available: US-199 (Spool Data v2 Story 1 -- 6 missing PIDs). Prior: Session 63: Shipped US-193 (TD-023 fix -- MAC-as-serial-port resolution). New src/pi/obdii/bluetooth_helper.py (isMacAddress + idempotent bindRfcomm + releaseRfcomm + isRfcommBound with injectable subprocessRunner); obd_connection.py gained _resolvePort() and self._boundRfcomm lifecycle tracking so disconnect() only releases when this instance bound; OBD_DEFAULTS gained rfcommDevice=0 + rfcommChannel=1; scripts/connect_obdlink.sh lifted from Pi helper; specs/architecture.md §3.4 Bluetooth Connection Resolution added. TDD: tests/pi/obdii/test_bluetooth_helper.py 28 tests + test_obd_connection_mac_vs_path.py 7 tests, red first (ImportError) then green. Fast suite 2260 -> 2295 (+35, 0 regressions, 706.69s). ruff clean. TD-023 annotated Closed. Invariants honored: no sudo from Python, no hardcoded /dev/rfcomm0 in runtime code, no hardcoded MAC, obd.OBD() signature unchanged. Sprint 14 now 4/12 passes:true, 8 pending (0 blocked). Next P0 available: US-194 (TD-025+26 SyncClient PK fix). Prior: Session 62: Executed US-203 (TD-027 sweep -- 8 additional naive-timestamp writers) end-to-end on sprint/pi-harden. TDD: 16 tests in tests/pi/data/test_timestamp_format.py (TestExplicitPathWriters x8 behavioral + TestNoDatetimeNowInCaptureWriteFunctions x8 AST-walk) written first; red phase confirmed (17 fails) before any src/ edit, then green after fixes. 6 writer files touched: power_db.py (3 sites -- logPowerReading/logPowerTransition/logPowerSavingEvent all routed through utcIsoNow at DB boundary; transition keeps its timestamp param for BC with noqa:ARG001), obdii/data/logger.py (ObdDataLogger.logReading -> utcIsoNow), obdii/data/helpers.py (logReading -> utcIsoNow), analysis/engine.py (line 264 analysisDate = datetime.now(UTC) tz-aware; _storeStatistics computes canonical string ONCE via toCanonicalIso(result.analysisDate) before loop so all parameter rows in one run share the same analysis_date -- preserves MAX-grouping query semantics in getLatestAnalysisResult), alert/manager.py (_logAlertToDatabase -> utcIsoNow), power/battery.py (BatteryMonitor._logToDatabase -> utcIsoNow). Upstream naive datetime.now() in AlertEvent/PowerReading/VoltageReading __post_init__ + queryParameter:148 left as-is per Invariant #4 (boundary-coerce matches US-202 precedent). TD-027 fully closed -- annotated with final 12-writer audit table + upstream-dataclass-left-as-is section. All 3 ambiguous writers resolved; stopCondition #3 (>3 additional writers) did NOT trigger -- no fourth writer surfaced. Fast suite: 2244 -> 2260 passed (+16 new, 0 regressions, 710.65s). ruff clean on all 7 touched files (2 minor UP037/I001 auto-fixed in test file). No historical backfill (Invariant #1 carries forward). Key pattern learned: AST walk over inspect.getsource beats regex for source-level linting -- regex hit my own explanatory comments, AST sees through comments + docstrings. Exiting unassigned. Sprint 14 now 3/12 passes:true (US-202 + US-195 + US-203), 9 pending (0 blocked). Next P0 available: US-193 (TD-023 fix, gates fresh-Pi main.py).
